decision_log.decision: Model has been failing consistently since 2026-03-03
decision_log.rationale: 10 failures in 7 days with last success on 2026-03-02. Pattern is recurring — every scheduled run since 03-03 has failed with the same invalid identifier error.

tool_calls.input: SELECT STATUS, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME, MESSAGE FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'cs_chatbot_conversation_agg' AND CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
